tools.name: Helicone
tools.description: Open-source LLM observability platform with gateway-first approach. Sits between app and LLM providers to capture request-level data for cost, latency, and quality monitoring.
tools.pricing: Free tier: 10K requests/month. Paid tiers available (usage-based).
tools.target_audience: AI developers, startups, teams building LLM-powered apps

tools.name: Langfuse
tools.description: Fully open-source (MIT) tracing and cost tracking platform for LLM applications, built on OpenTelemetry. Framework-agnostic with self-hosting support.
tools.pricing: Free Cloud: 50K events/month. Pro and Enterprise tiers. Unlimited users on all tiers.
tools.target_audience: Developers wanting open-source, self-hosted LLM observability

tools.name: LangSmith
tools.description: Proprietary LLM monitoring and evaluation platform tightly integrated with the LangChain ecosystem. Provides live dashboards for cost, latency, and quality.
tools.pricing: Free: 5K traces/month. Paid plans available. Enterprise self-hosted option.
tools.target_audience: LangChain ecosystem users, enterprise teams

tools.name: LiteLLM
tools.description: Open-source LLM proxy providing unified interface for 100+ LLM providers with built-in spend tracking. Acts as a gateway for managing auth, load balancing, and cost tracking.
tools.pricing: Open-source (self-hosted free). Enterprise managed plans available.
tools.target_audience: Platform teams managing multi-provider LLM deployments

tools.name: Portkey
tools.description: Production AI control panel with AI gateway supporting 250+ models. Provides unified routing, observability, guardrails, and cost analytics. Recently made fully open source (March 2026).
tools.pricing: Free tier for development. Pro and Enterprise tiers (usage-based on logged requests). Recently open-sourced.
tools.target_audience: Enterprise teams, platform engineers building multi-provider AI systems

tools.name: Braintrust
tools.description: AI observability platform focused on monitoring, evaluation, and experimentation across the full LLM lifecycle. Only platform connecting evaluation results to deployment decisions.
tools.pricing: Starter: $0/month (10K scores, 1GB storage). Pro: $249/month (50K scores). Free: 1M trace spans + 10K scores/month.
tools.target_audience: Teams serious about quality-driven AI deployment with CI/CD integration

tools.name: Datadog LLM Observability
tools.description: Extension of enterprise Datadog monitoring platform with dedicated LLM observability. Combines cloud cost management with per-trace token and cost analytics.
tools.pricing: Enterprise pricing (part of Datadog platform). Usage-based.
tools.target_audience: Enterprise teams already using Datadog infrastructure

tools.name: Weights & Biases (Weave)
tools.description: LLM development toolkit connecting cost tracking with experimentation and evaluation workflows. Auto-tracks every LLM call with @weave.op decorator.
tools.pricing: Free tier available. Team and Enterprise plans.
tools.target_audience: ML teams and researchers doing LLM experimentation

tools.name: Arize Phoenix
tools.description: Open-source (7800+ stars) AI observability and evaluation platform built on OpenTelemetry. Auto-instruments popular frameworks and providers.
tools.pricing: Open-source (self-hosted free). Phoenix Cloud for production.
tools.target_audience: Developers wanting open-source, vendor-agnostic AI observability

tools.name: Cloudflare AI Gateway
tools.description: AI application gateway from Cloudflare with one-line setup for monitoring usage, costs, and errors across AI providers. Includes caching and custom cost configuration.
tools.pricing: Free tier included with Cloudflare. Pay-as-you-go for advanced features.
tools.target_audience: Developers already on Cloudflare or wanting simple gateway setup

tools.name: Bifrost
tools.description: High-performance open-source AI gateway built in Go. Benchmarked overhead of 11µs at 5,000 RPS. Built-in cost/usage monitoring and budget management.
key_features: semantic caching integration (Weaviate, Redis, Qdrant, Pinecone)
tools.pricing: Open-source (free).
tools.target_audience: Performance-sensitive production AI deployments

tools.name: Keywords AI
tools.description: Full-stack LLM engineering platform combining AI Gateway, Observability, Prompt Management, and Evaluations in one unified solution. Targets AI startups.
tools.pricing: Free tier available. Startup and enterprise plans.
tools.target_audience: AI startups and product teams

tools.name: Lunary
tools.description: Open-source LLM monitoring platform with focus on compliance and data privacy. Tracks cost, token usage, latency, and user behavior.
tools.pricing: Open-source with free tier. Paid plans for advanced features.
tools.target_audience: Privacy-conscious teams needing compliant LLM monitoring

tools.name: Traceloop (OpenLLMetry)
tools.description: Open-source observability for GenAI/LLM apps built on OpenTelemetry. Non-intrusive tracing with per-user cost attribution.
tools.pricing: Open-source library. SaaS platform with free and paid tiers.
tools.target_audience: Teams wanting OTel-native LLM observability with user-level cost tracking

tools.name: OpenLIT
tools.description: Open-source OpenTelemetry-native GenAI observability platform with GPU monitoring, guardrails, evaluations, and prompt management. One-line setup.
tools.pricing: Open-source (free).
tools.target_audience: Teams wanting comprehensive open-source AI observability including GPU

tools.name: CAST AI
tools.description: Kubernetes-focused AI infrastructure cost optimization. Automates cluster optimization for AI workloads with 50-70% infrastructure cost savings.
tools.pricing: Free cluster analysis. Paid optimization plans.
tools.target_audience: DevOps/MLOps teams running AI on Kubernetes

tools.name: CloudZero
tools.description: Cloud cost optimization platform with AI spend allocation and analysis. Uncovers waste and improves unit economics for AI workloads.
tools.pricing: Enterprise pricing.
tools.target_audience: Enterprise FinOps teams managing cloud + AI costs

tools.name: TrueFoundry
tools.description: LLM deployment and cost tracking platform. Routes inference traffic to API or self-hosted models. Single pane of glass for observability and cost attribution.
tools.pricing: Free tier. Enterprise plans available.
tools.target_audience: Teams deploying both API and self-hosted LLMs

tools.name: Binadox
tools.description: LLM cost optimization platform consolidating ChatGPT, Azure, Vertex AI, and Bedrock spending into one platform with real-time token tracking.
tools.pricing: Enterprise pricing.
tools.target_audience: Enterprise teams using multiple cloud AI providers

tools.name: PromptLayer
tools.description: Lightweight prompt management platform focused on logging, versioning, and analyzing LLM calls. Prompt registry for storing prompts outside code.
tools.pricing: Free tier. Paid plans available.
tools.target_audience: Teams wanting simple prompt management with cost visibility

tools.name: GPTCache
tools.description: Dedicated semantic caching library for LLM responses. Reduces costs by serving cached responses for semantically similar queries.
tools.pricing: Open-source (free).
tools.target_audience: Developers building cost-efficient LLM apps with high query similarity

tools.name: Sedai
tools.description: Autonomous cloud optimization platform using reinforcement learning for infrastructure optimization. Adjusts autoscaler policies, VM sizes, and container resources.
tools.pricing: Enterprise pricing.
tools.target_audience: Enterprise DevOps managing large-scale AI infrastructure
